title: Ashen Simple Foliage
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

___
Don't like Ashen 16x's bushy leaf models? Do you prefer vanilla's simpler models, or play with Fast Graphics? Then use this pack to disable the bushy leaves bundled in Ashen 16x.

This Add-On **requires** [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) in order to function!

Place this pack _above_ Ashen 16x in your load order. If you're also using this pack alongside [Ashen Autumn Forest](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen-autumn-forest), you can place this pack either above _or_ below Autumn Forest in your load order.
___
 
This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
